_comment: The feed on isaacpeterson.au reads this file. Add a new entry to the top of the posts array and commit. Fields: tag (short category label), title, date (YYYY-MM), url (link to the post, or null if none yet), image (optional path like assets/name.png, shows a thumbnail beside the post). The site sorts newest first by date.

posts.title: Is AI going to take my job
How I prompted a career plan using Claude
Running an LLM Council to make better decisions
Building a psychosocial risk tool from scratch with no code
